calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Approving Acts Taken By Agent Under C.Demartini'S Uniform Statutory Power Of Attorney And Advance Health Care Directive Dtd 4/27/09
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for and wih Thomas DeMartini (Petitioner). Andrew Schultz for Elizabeth Adler for (Trustee).

The Petition for Order Approving Acts Taken by Agent Under C. DeMartini's Uniform Statutory Power of Attorney and Advance Health Care Directive dated 4/27/09 was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION Petition For Order Approving Acts Taken By Agent Under C.Demartini'S Uniform Statutory Power Of Attorney And Advance Health Care Directive Dtd 4/27/09
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Thomas DeMartini. Andrew Schultz for Elizabeth Adler.

The Court would like to see the 850 Petition tried first. The Petition for Order Approving Acts Taken by Agent was continued to March 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to Lori DeMartini and Paul DeMartini.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
